findings.one_line: The universal orbit-mass iff is plausibly useful, but the supplied positioning names adjacent group-symmetry and causal-conformal classes without a theorem-level comparison that establishes what existing symmetry-based calibration/target-shift results fail to cover.

The exact evaluator is a named, computable restricted audit functional, but its present comparison to generic rectangle, simultaneous-conformal, and structured-volume work does not establish a recognized Stat frontier advance over the closest existing exact-rank or causal-conformal computation; on the current record it falls below the required field novelty floor.
